pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d GQA transformer couples MLP 3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 with Value Residual, Gated Attention, XSA, partial RoPE, Muon schedule, int6 GPTQ-lite quant.
techniques: MLP 3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 with Value Residual, Gated Attention, full XSA, and U-Net skips
Muon optimizer with momentum warmup, EMA, warmdown, and late QAT
Int6 uniform GPTQ-lite quantization with FP16 embedding passthrough
